topics: Electric charges and Conservation of charge

key_concepts: Field due to infinitely long straight wire, uniformly charged infinite plane sheet, thin spherical shell (inside/outside)

topics: Electric potential, potential difference, equipotential surfaces
subtopics: Potential due to point charge, dipole and system of charges; electrical potential energy
Conductors, insulators, free/bound charges, dielectrics and polarization
Capacitors: capacitance, series/parallel combinations, parallel plate capacitor with/without dielectric
key_concepts: Energy stored in a capacitor (formulae only)

subtopics: Ohm's law and V-I characteristics (linear/non-linear)
Electrical energy, power, resistivity, conductivity, temperature dependence of resistance
Internal resistance, emf, combination of cells in series/parallel
Kirchhoff's rules, Wheatstone bridge
key_concepts: Relation between drift velocity and electric current

topics: Concept of magnetic field, Oersted's experiment
subtopics: Biot-Savart law (circular loop), Ampere's law (straight wire)
Force on moving charge and current-carrying conductor
Torque on current loop, Current loop as magnetic dipole
Moving coil galvanometer: sensitivity and conversion
key_concepts: Definition of ampere via force between parallel conductors (qualitative solenoid treatment)

topics: Bar magnet as equivalent solenoid, magnetic dipole
subtopics: Magnetic field intensity along axis/perpendicular to axis (qualitative)
Torque on magnetic dipole in uniform field (qualitative), magnetic field lines
Para-, dia- and ferro-magnetic substances, Magnetization of materials
key_concepts: Effect of temperature on magnetic properties

subtopics: Induced EMF and current, Lenz's Law
Self and mutual induction

topics: Alternating currents, peak and RMS values
subtopics: Reactance, impedance, LCR series circuit (phasors), resonance
Power in AC circuits, power factor, wattless current
AC generator, Transformer

topics: Displacement current, characteristics of EM waves
subtopics: Transverse nature (qualitative idea)
Electromagnetic spectrum and uses

chapters.source_chapter_name: Chapter–9: Ray Optics and Optical Instruments
subtopics: Refraction of light, total internal reflection, optical fibers
Refraction at spherical surfaces, lenses (thin lens formula, maker's formula)
Magnification, power, combination of thin lenses in contact
Prism refraction
Reflection and refraction of plane waves using wave fronts (proofs)
Interference: Young's double slit experiment, fringe width expression
Coherent sources, sustained interference, diffraction due to single slit

chapters.source_chapter_name: Chapter–11: Dual Nature of Radiation and Matter
topics: Dual nature of radiation, Photoelectric effect
subtopics: Hertz and Lenard's observations; Einstein's photoelectric equation (particle nature)
Experimental study of photoelectric effect
Matter waves: de-Broglie relation (wave nature)
Bohr model of hydrogen atom (radius, velocity, energy expressions)
Hydrogen line spectra (qualitative treatment)

topics: Composition and size of nucleus, nuclear force
subtopics: Mass-energy relation, mass defect, binding energy per nucleon variation with mass number
Nuclear fission, Nuclear fusion

topics: Energy bands in conductors, semiconductors, insulators

Application of junction diode as a rectifier
